title: Totem of Dino Nugget V.2
body:
# Dino Nuggie !
This ressource pack will transform your Totem of undying into a cute dino nuggie :]
_A nice little Stegausorus nugget..._
### Version over 1.19 !
Changes model, texture, and item name [totem_of_undying -> Stegosaurus Dino Nugget] There's also a lolcat language version...
**This texture pack was inspired by the Dino nuggets edible texture pack by Bay**
